title: Navigating Swift Documentation for Cross-Platform Reading App
first_prompt: Please look at the project structure and research which Swift developer docs would be most useful for you to have access to when writing code.
summary: The conversation centered on developing a cross-platform reading application called Readar, requiring the integration of modern Swift features like distributed actors and strict concurrency. After initial attempts to review documentation and access the project structure, the focus shifted to implementing the necessary code changes. The assistant updated `Protocols.swift` and `Services.swift
